title: Garlic butter pasta
description: Simple, comforting — you already have most of this

steps.title: Boil water
steps.instruction: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Add pasta and cook for 8-10 minutes until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.instruction: Mince garlic and sauté in olive oil and butter over medium heat for 2 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add drained pasta to the pan. Toss with garlic butter, adding pasta water as needed.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Plate and top with grated parmesan. Serve immediately.

title: Chickpea stir-fry
description: Quick, high-protein, pantry-friendly

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Dice onion and bell pepper. Drain and rinse chickpeas.

steps.title: Heat pan
steps.instruction: Heat olive oil in a large pan over high heat.

steps.title: Cook onion
steps.instruction: Add onion and cook for 3 minutes until softened.

steps.title: Add chickpeas
steps.instruction: Add chickpeas and bell pepper. Stir-fry for 5 minutes until slightly crispy.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Season with salt, pepper and spices. Serve hot.

title: Tomato rice soup
description: Cozy and light on budget

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Dice onion and mince garlic. Sauté in a pot with olive oil for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add canned tomatoes and crush with a spoon. Cook for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock and rice
steps.instruction: Pour in vegetable stock and add rice. Stir well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Bring to a boil then reduce heat. Simmer for 18 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot.

title: Spinach feta scramble
description: Fast high-protein breakfast or dinner

steps.title: Beat eggs
steps.instruction: Crack 3 eggs into a bowl and beat with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Heat pan
steps.instruction: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.

steps.title: Cook eggs
steps.instruction: Pour in eggs and gently stir. Remove from heat when just set.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Plate immediately and serve with toast or pita.

title: Black bean tacos
description: Ready in 15 minutes, crowd-pleaser

steps.title: Warm beans
steps.instruction: Heat black beans in a pan with cumin and salt for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Warm tortillas
steps.instruction: Heat tortillas in a dry pan for 30 seconds each side.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Fill tortillas with beans, diced onion and toppings.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with lime wedges.

title: Lemon rice with garlic
description: Light side dish or simple main

steps.title: Cook rice
steps.instruction: Rinse rice and cook in 400ml water for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.instruction: Mince garlic and sauté in olive oil for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add cooked rice to the garlic pan. Squeeze lemon juice over top.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Toss and serve warm. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Rice and peas
description: Haitian comfort food classic

steps.title: Season beans
steps.instruction: Heat black beans with garlic, thyme, and salt for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add rinsed rice and stir to coat with the bean mixture.

steps.title: Add water
steps.instruction: Pour in 400ml water. Bring to a boil.

steps.title: Cook covered
steps.instruction: Cover and cook on lowest heat for 18 minutes.

steps.title: Rest and serve
steps.instruction: Rest 5 minutes then fluff and serve.

title: Scrambled eggs and toast
description: Classic breakfast, under 10 minutes

steps.title: Beat eggs
steps.instruction: Beat eggs with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Melt butter
steps.instruction: Melt butter in a pan over low heat.

steps.title: Scramble
steps.instruction: Add eggs and stir slowly. Remove while slightly wet.

steps.title: Toast and serve
steps.instruction: Serve eggs on toast immediately.

title: Pasta aglio e olio
description: 5-ingredient Italian classic

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta in salted water until al dente. Reserve pasta water.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.instruction: Slice garlic and cook in olive oil for 3 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Toss pasta with garlic oil, adding pasta water to create sauce.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Plate and add red pepper flakes if available.

title: Haitian rice and beans
description: Diri ak pwa — a household staple

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook diced onion and garlic in olive oil for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add beans
steps.instruction: Add chickpeas, thyme, salt and pepper. Cook 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add rice and 400ml water. Bring to a boil.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Cover and cook on low heat for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Rest 5 minutes, fluff and serve.

title: Fried plantains
description: Sweet and crispy Haitian side

steps.title: Slice plantains
steps.instruction: Peel and slice plantains diagonally into 1cm pieces.

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.instruction: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Fry plantains for 2-3 minutes per side until golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Drain on paper towels. Season with salt and serve hot.

title: Onion omelette
description: Simple protein-packed breakfast

steps.title: Prep
steps.instruction: Thinly slice onion. Beat eggs with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Cook onion
steps.instruction: Melt butter and cook onion for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Pour beaten eggs over onions. Tilt to spread evenly.

steps.title: Fold and serve
steps.instruction: Fold in half when edges set and slide onto plate.

title: Chickpea salad
description: No-cook high-protein lunch

steps.title: Drain beans
steps.instruction: Drain and rinse chickpeas.

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Finely dice onion and chop any fresh herbs.

steps.title: Dress
steps.instruction: Combine chickpeas and onion. Drizzle with olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Toss well and serve immediately or refrigerate.

title: Garlic fried rice
description: Use up leftover rice in 10 minutes

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.instruction: Heat oil in a wok over high heat.

steps.title: Fry garlic
steps.instruction: Add minced garlic and fry for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add cold rice and stir-fry for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Push rice aside, scramble eggs in center, then mix.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Season with soy sauce and salt. Serve hot.

title: Butter pasta with parmesan
description: Kid-friendly comfort in 15 minutes

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta in salted water for 8-10 minutes.

steps.title: Reserve water
steps.instruction: Scoop out pasta water before draining.

steps.title: Add butter
steps.instruction: Return pasta to pot. Add butter and toss until melted.

steps.title: Add parmesan
steps.instruction: Add parmesan and pasta water. Toss until creamy.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with extra parmesan.

title: Dal tadka
description: Warming Indian lentil curry

steps.title: Cook aromatics
steps.instruction: Fry diced onion and garlic in oil until golden, about 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add spices
steps.instruction: Add cumin, turmeric, and chili. Cook for 1 minute.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add crushed tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Add 500ml water and simmer for 20 minutes until thick.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve hot with rice or naan.

title: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce

steps.title: Cook base
steps.instruction: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add tomatoes, cumin, paprika, and salt. Simmer 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Make wells in the sauce and crack eggs in. Cover and cook 8 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve directly from the pan with bread.

title: Aloo gobi
description: Spiced potato and cauliflower

steps.title: Fry spices
steps.instruction: Heat oil and fry cumin seeds and garlic for 1 minute.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add diced onion, cook 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Add 100ml water and simmer covered for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice.

title: French onion soup
description: Classic French bistro comfort

steps.title: Caramelize onions
steps.instruction: Slice onions and cook in butter over low heat for 30 minutes until deeply caramelized.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.instruction: Pour in vegetable stock and simmer for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.instruction: Toast slices of bread until golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Ladle soup into bowls, top with bread and grated parmesan.

title: Griot (Haitian fried pork)
description: Crispy marinated pork — a celebration dish

steps.title: Marinate
steps.instruction: Mix garlic, onion, citrus juice, and spices. Marinate pork for at least 2 hours.

steps.title: Braise
steps.instruction: Cook pork in marinade with water over medium heat for 45 minutes.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Remove pork and fry in hot oil until crispy on all sides.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with rice and peas and pikliz.

title: Guacamole and chips
description: Fresh and ready in 5 minutes

steps.title: Mash avocado
steps.instruction: Mash ripe avocado in a bowl with a fork.

steps.title: Add ingredients
steps.instruction: Mix in minced garlic, diced onion, lime juice, salt.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

title: Miso soup with tofu
description: Light Japanese comfort in 10 minutes

steps.title: Heat broth
steps.instruction: Heat vegetable stock until almost boiling.

steps.title: Add miso
steps.instruction: Dissolve 2 tbsp miso paste in a ladle of hot broth, then add back to pot.

steps.title: Add tofu
steps.instruction: Add diced tofu and green onions. Heat 1 minute without boiling.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Ladle into bowls and serve immediately.

title: Pesto pasta
description: Bright and fresh Italian classic

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta until al dente. Reserve pasta water.

steps.title: Make pesto
steps.instruction: Blend basil, garlic, olive oil, parmesan and pine nuts.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Toss hot pasta with pesto, adding pasta water if needed.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with extra parmesan.

title: Vegetable stir-fry
description: Colorful and quick Asian classic

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Slice all vegetables into thin, uniform pieces.

steps.title: Heat wok
steps.instruction: Heat oil in wok until smoking.

steps.title: Stir-fry
steps.instruction: Add vegetables in order of firmness. Stir-fry on high heat for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Add soy sauce and serve over rice.

title: Banana pancakes
description: 2-ingredient healthy breakfast

steps.title: Make batter
steps.instruction: Mash bananas and mix with beaten eggs until smooth.

steps.title: Cook pancakes
steps.instruction: Pour small rounds into a non-stick pan. Cook 2 minutes per side.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with honey or fresh fruit.

title: Tabbouleh
description: Fresh Lebanese parsley salad

steps.title: Cook bulgur
steps.instruction: Cook bulgur wheat in water for 15 minutes. Cool.

steps.title: Chop herbs
steps.instruction: Finely chop parsley, mint, and tomatoes.

steps.title: Dress
steps.instruction: Combine bulgur, herbs, and diced onion. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season with salt and serve at room temperature.

title: Akra (Haitian fritters)
description: Crispy malanga fritters

steps.title: Grate malanga
steps.instruction: Grate malanga or taro root into a bowl.

steps.title: Season
steps.instruction: Mix in minced garlic, scotch bonnet, salt and green onion.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Drop spoonfuls into hot oil and fry 3 minutes per side.

steps.title: Drain and serve
steps.instruction: Drain on paper towels and serve hot.

title: Quesadillas
description: Cheesy Mexican classic in 10 minutes

steps.title: Prep filling
steps.instruction: Dice bell pepper and onion. Grate cheese.

steps.title: Fill tortilla
steps.instruction: Place cheese and vegetables on half of a tortilla. Fold over.

steps.title: Cook
steps.instruction: Cook in a dry pan for 2 minutes per side until golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Slice and serve with salsa or sour cream.

title: Ratatouille
description: French Provençal vegetable stew

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in olive oil for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add diced zucchini, eggplant, and bell pepper. Cook 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add crushed tomatoes and herbs. Stir well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Simmer covered for 25 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve warm with crusty bread.

title: Jerk seasoned rice bowl
description: Caribbean-inspired spicy rice

steps.title: Cook rice
steps.instruction: Cook rice in 400ml water for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté vegetables
steps.instruction: Cook diced onion, garlic, and bell pepper in oil with jerk spices for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Mix vegetables into cooked rice.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve warm in bowls.

title: Egg fried rice
description: Better than takeout, faster too

steps.title: Heat wok
steps.instruction: Heat oil in wok over very high heat.

steps.title: Scramble eggs
steps.instruction: Scramble eggs quickly and set aside.

steps.title: Fry rice
steps.instruction: Stir-fry cold rice for 3 minutes, breaking up clumps.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add eggs back, season with soy sauce and serve.

title: Croque monsieur
description: French grilled ham and cheese

steps.title: Make béchamel
steps.instruction: Melt butter, add flour and milk. Stir until thick sauce forms.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Spread béchamel on bread, add ham and cheese, top with another slice.

steps.title: Grill
steps.instruction: Bake at 200°C for 10 minutes until golden and bubbly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve hot with a simple green salad.

title: Bean and rice burrito
description: Filling Mexican wrap under 15 minutes

steps.title: Warm beans
steps.instruction: Heat black beans with cumin and salt.

steps.title: Cook rice
steps.instruction: Cook rice if not using leftovers.

steps.title: Warm tortilla
steps.instruction: Warm tortilla in a dry pan.

steps.title: Assemble and roll
steps.instruction: Fill with beans, rice, and diced onion. Roll tightly and serve.

title: Hummus with pita
description: Creamy Lebanese dip ready in 5 minutes

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Blend chickpeas, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, and tahini until smooth.

steps.title: Season
steps.instruction: Season with salt, cumin, and more lemon if needed.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Drizzle with olive oil and serve with pita or vegetables.

title: Palak paneer
description: Creamy Indian spinach and cheese

steps.title: Blanch spinach
steps.instruction: Blanch spinach in boiling water for 2 minutes. Drain and blend to puree.

steps.title: Cook base
steps.instruction: Fry onion, garlic, and ginger in oil for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add spices and tomato
steps.instruction: Add cumin, garam masala, tomatoes. Cook 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add spinach
steps.instruction: Add spinach puree and cream. Simmer 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add paneer and serve
steps.instruction: Add cubed paneer, heat through, and serve with rice.

title: Banana oatmeal
description: Wholesome breakfast in 5 minutes

steps.title: Cook oats
steps.instruction: Cook oats in water or milk for 3-4 minutes.

steps.title: Add banana
steps.instruction: Slice banana and stir into oats.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Top with honey, nuts or cinnamon and serve.

title: Vegetable curry
description: Fragrant Indian mixed vegetable curry

steps.title: Fry aromatics
steps.instruction: Fry onion, garlic, and ginger in oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add spices
steps.instruction: Add curry powder, turmeric, and cumin. Toast 1 minute.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add diced vegetables and tomatoes. Stir well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Add 200ml water and simmer 20 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with rice or naan.

title: Soup joumou
description: Haitian pumpkin soup — served on New Year's Day

steps.title: Brown beef
steps.instruction: Brown beef chunks in oil with garlic and onion.

steps.title: Add pumpkin
steps.instruction: Add cubed pumpkin and 1.5L water. Bring to boil.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add carrots, turnips, cabbage, and pasta. Season well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Simmer for 45 minutes until everything is tender.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve hot in large bowls with crusty bread.

title: Falafel wrap
description: Crispy chickpea bites in a warm wrap

steps.title: Make falafel mix
steps.instruction: Blend chickpeas, garlic, onion, cumin, and flour until just combined.

steps.title: Form balls
steps.instruction: Shape into small balls or patties.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Fry in oil for 3-4 minutes until golden and crispy.

steps.title: Assemble wrap
steps.instruction: Fill warm flatbread with falafel, salad, and tahini sauce.

title: Spaghetti marinara
description: Simple Italian tomato pasta

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta until al dente. Reserve pasta water.

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.instruction: Fry garlic in olive oil for 1 minute, add tomatoes, simmer 10 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Toss pasta with sauce, adding pasta water if needed.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with fresh basil and parmesan.

title: Korean bibimbap bowl
description: Mixed rice bowl with vegetables and egg

steps.title: Cook rice
steps.instruction: Cook rice for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté vegetables
steps.instruction: Sauté julienned vegetables separately in sesame oil.

steps.title: Fry egg
steps.instruction: Fry an egg sunny side up.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Place rice in bowl, arrange vegetables, top with egg and gochujang.

title: Avocado toast
description: Trendy breakfast ready in 5 minutes

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.instruction: Toast bread to your liking.

steps.title: Prep avocado
steps.instruction: Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and red pepper flakes.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Spread avocado on toast. Top with a fried egg if desired.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season with salt, pepper, and olive oil drizzle.

title: Chakchouka tunisienne
description: North African spiced egg and pepper dish

steps.title: Cook peppers
steps.instruction: Sauté sliced peppers and onion in oil for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add tomatoes, garlic, and spices. Simmer 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Make wells and crack eggs in. Cover and cook 7 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve straight from the pan with crusty bread.

title: Salade niçoise
description: Classic French composed salad

steps.title: Hard boil eggs
steps.instruction: Boil eggs for 8 minutes. Cool in ice water.

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Slice tomatoes, olives, and onion.

steps.title: Make dressing
steps.instruction: Whisk olive oil, red wine vinegar, and Dijon mustard.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Arrange all ingredients on a plate. Drizzle with dressing.

title: Riz djon djon
description: Haitian black mushroom rice — a special occasion dish

steps.title: Steep mushrooms
steps.instruction: Soak dried djon djon mushrooms in 500ml hot water for 20 minutes. Strain liquid.

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in oil for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add rice and mushroom liquid. Bring to boil.

steps.title: Cook
steps.instruction: Cover and cook on low heat for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Fluff with a fork and serve.

title: Naan pizza
description: Quick Indian flatbread pizza

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 220°C.

steps.title: Prep toppings
steps.instruction: Mix tomatoes with garlic, olive oil, and oregano for sauce.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Spread sauce on naan, top with cheese and vegetables.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake for 8-10 minutes until cheese is bubbly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Slice and serve immediately.

title: Pasta e fagioli
description: Italian pasta and bean soup

steps.title: Sauté base
steps.instruction: Fry garlic in olive oil for 1 minute. Add tomatoes and cook 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add beans
steps.instruction: Add beans and 700ml water. Bring to boil.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Add pasta and cook for 10 minutes until tender.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Drizzle with olive oil and serve with crusty bread.

title: Smoothie bowl
description: Nutrient-packed breakfast bowl

steps.title: Blend base
steps.instruction: Blend frozen banana with a splash of milk until thick and smooth.

steps.title: Pour
steps.instruction: Pour into a bowl — it should be thick enough to hold toppings.

steps.title: Top and serve
steps.instruction: Top with granola, fresh fruit, and honey. Serve immediately.

title: Soupe à l'oignon gratinée
description: Classic French onion soup with cheese

steps.title: Caramelize onions
steps.instruction: Slowly cook sliced onions in butter for 35 minutes until deep golden.

steps.title: Deglaze and simmer
steps.instruction: Add wine and stock. Simmer for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Toast croutons
steps.instruction: Toast thick bread slices until very dry and golden.

steps.title: Gratinée
steps.instruction: Ladle soup into oven-safe bowls, top with bread and cheese, broil until bubbly.

title: Maafe (West African peanut stew)
description: Rich and creamy groundnut stew

steps.title: Brown protein
steps.instruction: Brown chicken or beef in oil. Set aside.

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in same pan for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes and peanut butter
steps.instruction: Add crushed tomatoes and 3 tbsp peanut butter. Mix well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Return meat, add 500ml water and simmer for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve over white rice.

title: Banana bread
description: Use up overripe bananas in this classic loaf

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 175°C. Grease a loaf pan.

steps.title: Mash bananas
steps.instruction: Mash 3 overripe bananas until smooth.

steps.title: Mix batter
steps.instruction: Beat in eggs, melted butter, sugar, flour, and baking soda until just combined.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Pour into pan and bake for 55 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.

steps.title: Cool and serve
steps.instruction: Cool for 10 minutes before slicing.

title: Carrot and ginger soup
description: Use up carrots before they soften

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in olive oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add carrots
steps.instruction: Add sliced carrots and ginger. Cook 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.instruction: Pour in stock and bring to boil. Simmer 20 minutes.

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Blend until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with a swirl of cream and crusty bread.

title: Spinach and egg frittata
description: Rescue wilting spinach in this Italian baked omelette

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 190°C.

steps.title: Sauté spinach
steps.instruction: Wilt spinach and onion in olive oil in an oven-safe pan for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Beat eggs with parmesan, salt and pepper. Pour over spinach.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake for 12 minutes until set and golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Slice into wedges and serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Stale bread panzanella
description: Tuscan bread salad — the best use for stale bread

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.instruction: Cube stale bread and toast in olive oil until golden.

steps.title: Chop vegetables
steps.instruction: Dice tomatoes, cucumber, and red onion.

steps.title: Dress
steps.instruction: Toss bread and vegetables with olive oil, red wine vinegar, and basil.

steps.title: Rest and serve
steps.instruction: Let sit 10 minutes so bread absorbs dressing. Serve at room temperature.

title: Zucchini fritters
description: Crispy fritters for zucchini past its prime

steps.title: Grate and drain zucchini
steps.instruction: Grate zucchini, salt generously and squeeze out all moisture.

steps.title: Mix batter
steps.instruction: Combine zucchini with beaten eggs, flour, parmesan, and garlic.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Fry spoonfuls in oil for 3 minutes per side until golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve hot with yogurt dipping sauce.

title: Sweet potato soup
description: Velvety soup for sweet potatoes about to turn

steps.title: Roast sweet potato
steps.instruction: Dice sweet potato and roast at 200°C for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Combine roasted sweet potato with aromatics and stock. Blend until smooth.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Season with salt, cumin, and chili. Serve hot.

title: Bread pudding
description: Classic comfort dessert from leftover bread

steps.title: Prep bread
steps.instruction: Cube stale bread and place in a greased baking dish.

steps.title: Make custard
steps.instruction: Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon. Pour over bread.

steps.title: Soak
steps.instruction: Let bread soak for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake at 175°C for 35 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream.

title: Potato leek soup
description: French classic for aging potatoes and leeks

steps.title: Sauté leeks
steps.instruction: Slice leeks and soften in butter for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add potatoes
steps.instruction: Add diced potatoes and garlic. Cook 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.instruction: Pour in stock and simmer for 20 minutes until potatoes are tender.

steps.title: Blend and serve
steps.instruction: Blend partially for a creamy texture. Season and serve.

title: Tomato bruschetta
description: Italian appetizer for overripe tomatoes

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.instruction: Grill or toast thick bread slices until golden.

steps.title: Prep topping
steps.instruction: Dice tomatoes, mix with garlic, olive oil, basil, salt and pepper.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Rub toast with garlic clove. Spoon tomato mixture on top.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Drizzle with extra olive oil and serve immediately.

title: Mushroom risotto
description: Creamy Italian rice for aging mushrooms

steps.title: Sauté mushrooms
steps.instruction: Cook sliced mushrooms in butter until golden. Set aside.

steps.title: Toast rice
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in butter. Add arborio rice and toast 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock gradually
steps.instruction: Add warm stock one ladle at a time, stirring constantly for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Finish
steps.instruction: Stir in mushrooms, parmesan, and butter. Season well.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately in warm bowls.

title: Yogurt flatbread
description: 2-ingredient flatbread using yogurt about to expire

steps.title: Make dough
steps.instruction: Mix 200g plain yogurt with 200g self-raising flour until a soft dough forms.

steps.title: Divide
steps.instruction: Divide into 4 balls and roll out thin.

steps.title: Cook
steps.instruction: Cook in a dry pan over high heat for 2 minutes per side until charred.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Brush with butter and serve with hummus or soup.

title: Roasted vegetable medley
description: Use up any vegetables before they go bad

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 220°C.

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Cut all vegetables into similar-sized chunks.

steps.title: Season
steps.instruction: Toss with olive oil, salt, pepper, and herbs.

steps.title: Roast
steps.instruction: Spread on a baking tray and roast for 25-30 minutes until caramelized.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve as a side or over rice or pasta.

title: Milk rice pudding
description: Use up milk before it turns

steps.title: Heat milk
steps.instruction: Heat 600ml milk in a saucepan until just simmering.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add arborio or short-grain rice and sugar. Stir well.

steps.title: Cook slowly
steps.instruction: Cook on low heat for 25 minutes, stirring frequently.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve warm with cinnamon and jam.

title: French toast
description: The best use for day-old bread

steps.title: Make custard
steps.instruction: Beat eggs with milk, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon.

steps.title: Soak bread
steps.instruction: Dip thick bread slices in custard for 30 seconds each side.

steps.title: Cook
steps.instruction: Fry in butter over medium heat for 3 minutes per side until golden.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with maple syrup, powdered sugar, or fresh fruit.

title: Cauliflower fried rice
description: Low-carb way to use up aging cauliflower

steps.title: Rice cauliflower
steps.instruction: Pulse cauliflower in a food processor until rice-sized pieces.

steps.title: Stir-fry
steps.instruction: Fry garlic and onion in oil for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add cauliflower
steps.instruction: Add cauliflower rice and cook for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Push to sides, scramble eggs in center, then mix.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Season with soy sauce and serve hot.

title: Overripe mango smoothie
description: Rescue soft mangoes in a tropical drink

steps.title: Prep fruit
steps.instruction: Peel and cube overripe mango. Freeze for 1 hour for thicker smoothie.

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Blend mango with coconut milk, lime juice, and ice until smooth.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

title: Potato hash
description: Crispy breakfast hash for aging potatoes

steps.title: Dice and boil
steps.instruction: Dice potatoes and parboil for 5 minutes. Drain.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Fry potatoes in oil on high heat for 8 minutes until crispy.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add diced onion, pepper, and garlic. Cook 3 more minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season well and serve topped with fried eggs if desired.

title: Cheese and onion tart
description: French-style tart for aging cheese and onions

steps.title: Caramelize onions
steps.instruction: Cook sliced onions in butter for 20 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Make custard
steps.instruction: Beat eggs with cream, cheese, salt and pepper.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Line a tart pan with pastry, add onions, pour custard over.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake at 190°C for 25 minutes until set and golden.

title: Apple cinnamon porridge
description: Warm breakfast for bruised apples

steps.title: Cook oats
steps.instruction: Simmer oats in milk or water for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Cook apples
steps.instruction: In a separate pan, cook diced apple with butter, cinnamon and brown sugar for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Combine and serve
steps.instruction: Top oats with spiced apples and a drizzle of honey.

title: Wilted greens pasta
description: Revive aging leafy greens in this simple pasta

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta until al dente. Reserve pasta water.

steps.title: Wilt greens
steps.instruction: Sauté garlic in olive oil. Add any wilting greens and cook until just soft.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Toss pasta with greens, adding pasta water to loosen.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Finish with chili flakes, lemon zest, and parmesan.

title: Pumpkin soup
description: Silky soup for pumpkin or squash past its best

steps.title: Roast pumpkin
steps.instruction: Roast diced pumpkin with olive oil at 200°C for 25 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook onion and garlic in oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Blend roasted pumpkin with aromatics, stock, and coconut milk until smooth.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season and serve with toasted seeds and bread.

title: Greek yogurt parfait
description: Use up yogurt and fruit in this layered dessert

steps.title: Prep fruit
steps.instruction: Slice any ripe or overripe fruit.

steps.title: Layer
steps.instruction: Layer yogurt, granola, and fruit in a glass or bowl.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

title: Cornbread with old corn
description: Use up canned or frozen corn in fluffy cornbread

steps.title: Preheat
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 200°C. Grease a baking pan.

steps.title: Mix dry ingredients
steps.instruction: Combine cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.

steps.title: Mix wet ingredients
steps.instruction: Whisk eggs, milk, melted butter, and corn kernels.

steps.title: Combine and bake
steps.instruction: Mix wet into dry. Pour into pan and bake 20-25 minutes.

title: Pepper and egg sandwich
description: Italian-American breakfast for aging peppers

steps.title: Sauté peppers
steps.instruction: Slice peppers and onion. Cook in olive oil for 8 minutes until soft.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Beat eggs and pour over peppers. Scramble gently.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Stuff into a crusty roll and serve immediately.

title: Creamy potato gratin
description: French gratin dauphinois for potatoes that need using

steps.title: Prep potatoes
steps.instruction: Thinly slice potatoes and pat dry.

steps.title: Layer
steps.instruction: Layer potatoes in a buttered dish with garlic, cream, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.

steps.title: Top with cheese
steps.instruction: Sprinkle parmesan on top.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Cover and bake at 180°C for 45 minutes. Uncover for last 15 minutes.

title: Pan-seared chicken breast
description: Juicy golden chicken with butter sauce — 12 minutes

steps.title: Flatten chicken
steps.instruction: Slice each chicken breast in half horizontally to form thin steaks. Pat dry with paper towels.

steps.title: Season
steps.instruction: Mix paprika, salt, and pepper. Coat chicken evenly on both sides.

steps.title: Sear
steps.instruction: Melt half the butter with olive oil in a pan over high heat. Cook chicken 2.5 minutes per side until golden.

steps.title: Rest chicken
steps.instruction: Transfer chicken to a plate. Rest 3 minutes.

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.instruction: Lower heat. Add remaining butter to pan and simmer 1 minute, scraping up the golden bits. Pour over chicken and serve.

title: Tuscan chicken with spinach
description: Creamy one-pan chicken with spinach and parmesan

steps.title: Sear chicken
steps.instruction: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and paprika. Sear in olive oil over medium-high heat for 3-5 minutes per side until golden. Set aside.

steps.title: Cook garlic
steps.instruction: In the same pan, sauté minced garlic for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.instruction: Add cream and parmesan. Stir until combined and slightly thickened, about 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add spinach
steps.instruction: Add spinach and stir until wilted.

steps.title: Finish
steps.instruction: Return chicken to pan. Cover and cook 5 minutes until chicken is cooked through. Serve immediately.

title: Sheet pan salmon with broccoli and carrots
description: Asian-inspired one-pan dinner ready in 20 minutes

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 200°C. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.instruction: Whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, minced garlic, and grated ginger.

steps.title: Arrange pan
steps.instruction: Cut broccoli into florets and slice carrots. Place salmon and vegetables on the baking sheet. Drizzle half the sauce over everything.

steps.title: Roast
steps.instruction: Bake for 12 minutes until salmon flakes easily. If vegetables need more time, remove salmon and roast 3 more minutes.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Drizzle remaining sauce over everything. Serve with rice.

title: Salmon and broccoli stir-fry
description: 5-ingredient weeknight stir-fry from Food Network

steps.title: Cook broccoli
steps.instruction: Add 1cm water to a wok. Bring to boil. Add broccoli florets, cover loosely and cook 4 minutes until bright green. Drain.

steps.title: Sear salmon
steps.instruction: Heat oil in the same pan over medium-high. Season salmon with salt and pepper. Cook 3 minutes undisturbed until browned.

steps.title: Add garlic
steps.instruction: Sprinkle minced garlic over salmon. Flip salmon carefully.

steps.title: Finish
steps.instruction: Pour soy sauce over salmon. Add broccoli back. Cook 3 more minutes until salmon is cooked through.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately over rice or noodles.

title: Garlic butter salmon with mushrooms
description: Rich and easy 15-minute salmon dinner

steps.title: Cook mushrooms
steps.instruction: Slice mushrooms and cook in butter over medium-high heat for 5 minutes until golden. Add minced garlic and cook 1 more minute. Set aside.

steps.title: Sear salmon
steps.instruction: Add olive oil to same pan. Season salmon with salt and pepper. Cook skin-side down 4 minutes, then flip and cook 2 more minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Return mushrooms to pan. Spoon garlic butter over salmon.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with vegetables or rice.

title: Broccoli and mushroom stir-fry
description: Vegan 15-minute stir-fry with soy and ginger

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.instruction: Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, and a pinch of sugar in a small bowl.

steps.title: Stir-fry aromatics
steps.instruction: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and grated ginger. Cook 30 seconds.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add broccoli florets, sliced mushrooms, and a splash of water. Stir-fry 5-7 minutes until browned and tender.

steps.title: Add sauce
steps.instruction: Pour sauce over vegetables. Cook 1 more minute.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately over rice.

title: Baked chicken with tomatoes and cheese
description: Ricardo-inspired braised chicken with rich tomato sauce

steps.title: Brown chicken
steps.instruction: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Brown in olive oil over medium-high heat, 3 minutes per side. Set aside.

steps.title: Cook aromatics
steps.instruction: In the same pan, cook diced onion and minced garlic for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add diced tomatoes and thyme. Simmer 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add chicken
steps.instruction: Return chicken to pan. Spoon tomato mixture over it. Sprinkle with cheese.

steps.title: Broil
steps.instruction: Transfer to oven and broil 5 minutes until cheese is golden and chicken is cooked through.

title: Ground beef and zucchini skillet
description: Easy one-pan weeknight dinner

steps.title: Brown beef
steps.instruction: Cook ground beef in a large pan over medium-high heat until browned. Drain excess fat.

steps.title: Add vegetables
steps.instruction: Add diced onion, minced garlic, and sliced zucchini. Cook 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add crushed tomatoes, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper. Stir well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Simmer 5 minutes until sauce thickens slightly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve over rice or pasta, or on its own.

title: Mushroom and spinach frittata
description: Ricardo-inspired baked egg dish — perfect for brunch

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 190°C.

steps.title: Cook vegetables
steps.instruction: Sauté sliced mushrooms and diced onion in olive oil for 5 minutes. Add spinach and wilt. Season with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Beat eggs with parmesan, salt and pepper. Pour over vegetables in an oven-safe pan.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake 12-15 minutes until set and golden on top.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Slice into wedges and serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Carrot ginger soup
description: Silky blended soup for carrots past their prime

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook diced onion, minced garlic and grated ginger in olive oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add carrots
steps.instruction: Add sliced carrots. Cook 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.instruction: Pour in vegetable stock. Bring to boil then simmer 20 minutes until carrots are tender.

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Blend until smooth with a stick blender or in batches. Season with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with a swirl of cream and crusty bread.

title: Chicken and broccoli stir-fry
description: Classic takeout-style stir-fry at home

steps.title: Prep
steps.instruction: Slice chicken into thin strips. Cut broccoli into small florets. Mix soy sauce, sesame oil and a splash of water for the sauce.

steps.title: Cook chicken
steps.instruction: Cook chicken strips in a hot pan with oil for 4-5 minutes until golden. Set aside.

steps.title: Cook broccoli
steps.instruction: In the same pan, stir-fry broccoli, garlic and ginger for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Return chicken to pan. Pour sauce over everything and toss for 1 minute.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately over steamed rice.

title: Creamy mushroom pasta
description: Rich weeknight pasta with garlic mushroom sauce

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta in salted water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.

steps.title: Cook mushrooms
steps.instruction: Sauté sliced mushrooms in butter over high heat for 5 minutes until golden. Add garlic, cook 1 minute.

steps.title: Add cream
steps.instruction: Pour in cream. Simmer 2 minutes until slightly thickened.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add drained pasta to mushroom sauce. Toss with parmesan, adding pasta water to loosen.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with extra parmesan.

title: Ground beef tacos with avocado
description: Classic beef tacos ready in 20 minutes

steps.title: Cook beef
steps.instruction: Brown ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat. Drain fat.

steps.title: Season
steps.instruction: Add cumin, garlic powder, salt and pepper. Cook 2 minutes.

steps.title: Prep avocado
steps.instruction: Mash avocado with lime juice, diced onion, and salt.

steps.title: Warm tortillas
steps.instruction: Heat tortillas in a dry pan 30 seconds each side.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Fill tortillas with beef and top with avocado. Serve immediately.

title: Yogurt marinated chicken
description: Tender oven-baked chicken with yogurt marinade

steps.title: Marinate
steps.instruction: Mix yogurt, minced garlic, grated ginger, curry powder, olive oil, salt and pepper. Coat chicken and marinate 30 minutes minimum.

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 220°C.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Place chicken on a baking sheet. Bake 20-25 minutes until cooked through and slightly charred.

steps.title: Rest
steps.instruction: Rest 5 minutes before serving.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve with rice, flatbread and extra yogurt sauce.

title: Spinach and lentil soup
description: Hearty high-protein soup using wilting spinach

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Cook diced onion and garlic in olive oil for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add spices
steps.instruction: Add cumin, turmeric and chili flakes. Cook 1 minute.

steps.title: Add lentils and tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add lentils, crushed tomatoes and stock. Bring to boil.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Simmer 20 minutes until lentils are tender.

steps.title: Add spinach
steps.instruction: Stir in spinach and cook 2 minutes until wilted. Season and serve.

title: Apple and cheddar quesadillas
description: Sweet and savory quesadilla for aging apples

steps.title: Prep filling
steps.instruction: Thinly slice apple. Grate cheddar cheese.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Spread cheese and apple slices on half a tortilla. Fold over.

steps.title: Cook
steps.instruction: Cook in a dry pan over medium heat, 2-3 minutes per side until golden and cheese is melted.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Slice and serve with a drizzle of honey or side salad.

title: Mango chicken curry
description: Tropical curry using overripe mango

steps.title: Cook aromatics
steps.instruction: Fry diced onion and garlic in oil for 4 minutes. Add curry powder and cook 1 minute.

steps.title: Add chicken
steps.instruction: Add diced chicken. Brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add mango
steps.instruction: Add diced mango and coconut milk. Stir well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Simmer 15 minutes until chicken is cooked and sauce thickens.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season with salt and serve over rice.

title: Baked salmon with lemon and garlic
description: Simple 15-minute oven-baked salmon

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 200°C. Line a baking dish with parchment.

steps.title: Season salmon
steps.instruction: Place salmon in dish. Drizzle with olive oil, lemon juice, and top with garlic slices and butter.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake 12-15 minutes until salmon flakes easily with a fork.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with roasted vegetables or salad.

title: Potato and leek soup
description: Classic French vichyssoise-style soup

steps.title: Soften leeks
steps.instruction: Slice leeks and cook gently in butter for 5 minutes until soft.

steps.title: Add potatoes
steps.instruction: Add diced potatoes and garlic. Cook 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.instruction: Pour in stock. Bring to boil then simmer 20 minutes until potatoes are tender.

steps.title: Blend
steps.instruction: Blend partially or fully to your preferred texture. Season with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve hot with crusty bread.

title: Tofu and vegetable stir-fry
description: Crispy tofu with seasonal vegetables

steps.title: Press tofu
steps.instruction: Press tofu between towels for 10 minutes. Cut into cubes.

steps.title: Fry tofu
steps.instruction: Fry tofu in oil over high heat until golden and crispy on all sides, about 8 minutes. Set aside.

steps.title: Stir-fry vegetables
steps.instruction: In the same pan, stir-fry sliced bell pepper, broccoli and garlic for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add sauce
steps.instruction: Return tofu. Add soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss for 1 minute.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve over steamed rice.

title: Avocado and egg toast
description: Trendy protein-packed breakfast

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.instruction: Toast bread to your liking.

steps.title: Mash avocado
steps.instruction: Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

steps.title: Cook eggs
steps.instruction: Fry or poach eggs to your liking.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Spread avocado on toast. Top with egg. Season with chili flakes and salt.

title: Milk-based béchamel pasta bake
description: Use up milk in this comforting baked pasta

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta until al dente. Drain and set aside.

steps.title: Make béchamel
steps.instruction: Melt butter in a saucepan. Whisk in flour. Gradually add milk, whisking continuously until thick and smooth.

steps.title: Add cheese
steps.instruction: Stir in half the cheese. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Mix pasta with béchamel. Pour into a baking dish. Top with remaining cheese.

steps.title: Bake
steps.instruction: Bake at 190°C for 20 minutes until golden and bubbling.

title: Yogurt cucumber sauce bowl
description: Light tzatziki-style bowl for aging yogurt and cucumber

steps.title: Prep cucumber
steps.instruction: Grate cucumber. Squeeze out all excess water using a clean cloth or paper towels.

steps.title: Mix
steps.instruction: Combine yogurt, cucumber, minced garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt and fresh herbs.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve as a dip with pita, or as a sauce over grilled meat or falafel.

title: Cheddar broccoli soup
description: Creamy comfort soup using broccoli and cheddar

steps.title: Sauté base
steps.instruction: Cook diced onion and garlic in butter for 4 minutes.

steps.title: Add broccoli
steps.instruction: Add broccoli florets. Cook 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add milk
steps.instruction: Pour in milk. Simmer 10 minutes until broccoli is tender.

steps.title: Add cheese
steps.instruction: Blend partially. Return to heat and stir in grated cheddar until melted.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Season well. Serve with bread.

title: Chicken and mushroom rice
description: One-pot comfort dinner — flavourful and filling

steps.title: Brown chicken
steps.instruction: Season and brown chicken pieces in butter over medium-high heat. Set aside.

steps.title: Cook mushrooms
steps.instruction: In same pan, cook sliced mushrooms and onion for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add rice and stir to coat. Add garlic.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.instruction: Pour in stock. Bring to boil. Add chicken back on top.

steps.title: Simmer covered
steps.instruction: Cover and cook on low heat for 18 minutes until rice is cooked and chicken done.
